title: Traditional British Fish Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from the British Isles, perfect for a chilly evening. This recipe combines the freshness of fish with the warmth of a rich broth.

ingredients.name: fish
ingredients.notes: any white fish such as cod or halibut

ingredients.name: stew
ingredients.notes: mixture of vegetables such as carrots and onions

instructions: Bring the fish stock to a boil in a large pot.
Add the diced potatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the fish to the pot and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until cooked through.
Add the stew mixture to the pot and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
